source: Curated from ddx-1e516bc9, the audit's 8/8 calibration bead.

input_summary.title: fizeau Execute: explicit Harness + empty Model + non-empty Profile/MinPower must route within harness's eligible models
deps: ddx-cfedee8e: ladder must supply MinPower for fizeau to act on
description_traits: problem and observed failure are explicit
root cause cites fizeau service_execute.go:193-224 and catalog locations
proposed fix and non-scope are separated
acceptance_traits: includes cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... ./cmd/... and lefthook pre-commit

rationale.reason: title names subsystem, precondition, and expected behavior
description includes observed problem, file:line root cause, proposed upstream change, and non-scope
acceptance criteria name concrete Test* symbols
AC asserts resolved model surfaces through spec, result, and UI endpoints
go test and lefthook gates are explicit
labels include phase, area, kind, and cross-reference facets
agent can identify source, desired behavior, non-scope, and verification from the bead alone
